description: Links persons (applicants and inventors) to patent publications, specifying their sequence numbers and roles for each publication.

columns.name: pat_publn_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the patent publication document.

columns.name: applt_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequence number indicating the person's position in the list of applicants (0 if not an applicant).

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the person involved in the patent publication.

columns.name: invt_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequence number indicating the person's position in the list of inventors (0 if not an inventor).
